mapper.sql: FROM alarm_record a LEFT JOIN school_info s ON a.school_id = s.id
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
AND DATE(a.created_at) = CURDATE() AND a.alarm_level = 1

SELECT COUNT(*)
AND DATE(a.created_at) = CURDATE() AND a.first_response_at IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, a.created_at, a.first_response_at) > CASE a.alarm_level WHEN 1 THEN 300 WHEN 2 THEN 600 ELSE 1800 END

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN a.first_response_at IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, a.created_at, a.first_response_at) ELSE NULL END) AS avgResponseTime, AVG(CASE WHEN a.handled_at IS NOT NULL AND a.first_response_at IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, a.first_response_at, a.handled_at) ELSE NULL END) AS avgHandleTime

SELECT s.school_type AS type, CASE s.school_type WHEN 1 THEN '幼儿园' WHEN 2 THEN '小学' WHEN 3 THEN '初中' WHEN 4 THEN '高中' WHEN 5 THEN '中职' WHEN 6 THEN '高校' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count
GROUP BY s.school_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT t.id AS townId, t.town_name AS townName, COUNT(*) AS count
LEFT JOIN town_info t ON s.town_id = t.id
AND t.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.id, t.town_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT a.alarm_type AS type, CASE a.alarm_type WHEN 1 THEN '紧急求助' WHEN 2 THEN '火灾' WHEN 3 THEN '治安' WHEN 4 THEN '校园欺凌' WHEN 5 THEN '食物中毒' WHEN 6 THEN '自然灾害' WHEN 7 THEN '其他' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count
GROUP BY a.alarm_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT a.id, a.alarm_no, s.school_name, a.alarm_type, CASE a.alarm_type WHEN 1 THEN '紧急求助' WHEN 2 THEN '火灾' WHEN 3 THEN '治安' WHEN 4 THEN '校园欺凌' WHEN 5 THEN '食物中毒' WHEN 6 THEN '自然灾害' WHEN 7 THEN '其他' ELSE '未知' END AS alarm_type_name, a.alarm_level, CASE a.alarm_level WHEN 1 THEN '重大' WHEN 2 THEN '较大' WHEN 3 THEN '一般' ELSE '未知' END AS alarm_level_name, a.alarm_title, a.status, CASE a.status WHEN 1 THEN '待处置' WHEN 2 THEN '处置中' WHEN 3 THEN '已督办' WHEN 4 THEN '已处置' WHEN 5 THEN '已关闭' ELSE '未知' END AS status_name, a.created_at
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT a.id, a.alarm_no, s.school_name, a.alarm_type, CASE a.alarm_type WHEN 1 THEN '紧急求助' WHEN 2 THEN '火灾' WHEN 3 THEN '治安' WHEN 4 THEN '校园欺凌' WHEN 5 THEN '食物中毒' WHEN 6 THEN '自然灾害' WHEN 7 THEN '其他' ELSE '未知' END AS alarm_type_name, a.alarm_level, CASE a.alarm_level WHEN 1 THEN '重大' WHEN 2 THEN '较大' WHEN 3 THEN '一般' ELSE '未知' END AS alarm_level_name, a.alarm_title, a.created_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.created_at, NOW()) AS timeout_minutes
AND a.first_response_at IS NULL AND a.status IN (1, 2, 3) AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, a.created_at, NOW()) > CASE a.alarm_level WHEN 1 THEN 300 WHEN 2 THEN 600 ELSE 1800 END ORDER BY a.created_at ASC
